note:
R2 ADVERSARIAL VERIFICATION PASSED. All five checkpoints confirmed:
(1) Coarea m<n strict matches Federer 3.2.12 exactly (after notational swap).
(2) Area formula citation Federer 3.2.3 correct for n=m=1 case (condition 1<=1 holds, J_1 f=|f'|, formula matches eq:area-1d).
(3) Derivation from area-1d to substitution is gap-free (injectivity collapses sum to singleton).
(4) H^k=L^k ref Federer 2.10.35 confirmed (book p.180: all measures agree on R^m).
(5) Delta composition Riesz argument is correct (pushforward identity via g=h circ f bijection, then test against Dirac mass). "Riesz" is slightly loose terminology but conclusion is valid.
(6) Coarea/area/substitution distinction correctly made throughout.
Minor non-blocking observations: H^k notation on domain/codomain (vs fix file's L^k) is handled by parenthetical; extension from 3.2.3(2) integrable to nonneg Borel is standard monotone convergence.
